queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE 'Azul Zulu JRE %' AND publisher = 'Azul Systems, Inc.' AND version LIKE '25.%';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE 'Azul Zulu JRE %' AND publisher = 'Azul Systems, Inc.' AND version LIKE '25.%' AND version_compare(version, '25.34.17') < 0);
